step_by_step_thinking: I agree with agent1’s assessment. Given the high concentration of G-cells relative to other hormone-producing cells in the pancreatic islets, gastrinomas indeed represent the most frequent type of functional endocrine tumors arising from the pancreas. There isn't another option listed that has such a significant cellular basis leading to higher incidence rates.
raw_response:
I agree with agent1’s assessment. Given the high concentration of G-cells relative to other hormone-producing cells in the pancreatic islets, gastrinomas indeed represent the most frequent type of functional endocrine tumors arising from the pancreas. There isn't another option listed that has such a significant cellular basis leading to higher incidence rates. 

Answer: B.
